# GitHub Copilot Instructions — Wavefoundry

Thin pointer. Read `AGENTS.md` first for the full agent operating surface.

## Startup Order

1. `AGENTS.md` — shortcuts, stage gate, framework script hygiene
2. `docs/prompts/index.md` — public command catalog

## Key Guardrails


<!-- waveframework:auto-guru begin — generated by render_agent_surfaces.py; do not edit -->
- Code and documentation Q&A: follow **Codebase and documentation questions (auto-Guru)** in `AGENTS.md` and `docs/agents/guru.md`; use Wavefoundry MCP (`code_ask`, `docs_search`) when attached; do not answer from memory alone.
<!-- waveframework:auto-guru end -->
<!-- waveframework:auto-guru end -->
- Stage gate before any code edit: consolidated change doc → wave admission → Prepare wave
- Never run `git commit` unless explicitly requested in the current session
- Seed edits require guard override approval

## Enforcement

Mechanical enforcement runs through `.github/hooks/hooks.json` (generated by `render_platform_surfaces.py`).
